About Aqtas Technologies

IT solutions built around how your business actually runs.

Aqtas Technologies is a Karachi-based IT solutions provider working across networking, security, cloud, communications and custom software. We start by understanding the operational reality of a business — its sites, its staff, its risk tolerance — then design infrastructure that fits it, rather than selling a fixed package.

Our team works as an extension of your internal IT function, or as the whole department for businesses that don't have one — handling everything from procurement and installation to day-to-day monitoring and support.

Practical innovation

We match technology to the problem — not the other way around.

Security-first design

Every network and system we deploy is built with protection in mind from day one, not bolted on after.

Long-term partnership

We stay on after go-live with monitoring, maintenance and support contracts, not just a one-time install.

8+SERVICE DISCIPLINES
24/7SUPPORT & MONITORING
100%VENDOR-NEUTRAL ADVICE
<24hTYPICAL RESPONSE TIME
What We Do

IT solutions across every layer of the stack

From the cabling in your server room to the software your staff use every day — we plan, install and support it.

Network Infrastructure

LAN/WAN design, structured cabling, wireless rollouts and switching that scale with the business.

  • Structured cabling & fiber
  • Enterprise Wi-Fi
  • Routing & switching

Cybersecurity

Firewalls, endpoint protection and threat monitoring to keep networks resilient against modern attacks.

  • Firewall & UTM deployment
  • Endpoint & email security
  • Vulnerability assessments

Cloud & Data Center

Server virtualization, cloud migration, backup and disaster recovery planning.

  • Server virtualization
  • Backup & disaster recovery
  • Cloud migration

Unified Communications

VoIP, IP-PABX and video conferencing that bring voice, video and messaging into one system.

  • VoIP & IP-PABX
  • Video conferencing
  • Contact center setup

Managed IT & Support

Ongoing monitoring, helpdesk and maintenance contracts so problems get caught before they become downtime.

  • Remote & on-site helpdesk
  • Proactive monitoring
  • AMC / SLA-backed support

Software & Web Development

Custom business applications, websites and ERP integrations built around real workflows.

  • Websites & web apps
  • Custom business software
  • ERP & systems integration

Surveillance & Access Control

CCTV, biometric access and integrated security systems for offices, warehouses and retail sites.

  • IP & CCTV camera systems
  • Biometric access control
  • Centralized monitoring

Hardware Procurement

Sourcing and supply of servers, workstations, POS and networking equipment from trusted manufacturers.

  • Servers & workstations
  • POS & peripherals
  • Networking equipment
How We Work

A straightforward path from problem to solution

ASSESS

Site & needs assessment

We walk through your current setup — network, hardware, software and pain points — and map it against how the business actually operates day to day.

DESIGN

Solution design & proposal

A clear, itemized proposal covering scope, equipment, timeline and cost — vendor-neutral, so recommendations are based on fit, not commission.

DEPLOY

Installation & integration

Our engineers handle procurement, installation and configuration on-site, with minimal disruption to daily operations.

SUPPORT

Monitoring & ongoing support

Post-deployment, systems are monitored and maintained under a support agreement, with a helpdesk for day-to-day issues.

Tell us what your IT setup looks like today.

We'll come back with a straightforward assessment and a proposal — no obligation, no generic package.
